title: Interest
description: A universal human motivation or value, independent of any specific conflict.

maslowLevel.description: Maslow hierarchy classification determines baseline validity band

baseValidityScore.description: Intrinsic validity of this interest class (context-independent). PHYSIOLOGICAL: 85–100, SAFETY: 70–85, BELONGING: 50–70, ESTEEM: 40–60, SELF_ACTUALIZATION: 30–50, INVALID: 0–20

semanticClusters.description: Keyword phrases used for NLP deduplication of brainstorm submissions
